items.english: Excuse me, where is the bank?
Where is the pharmacy?
Where is the bus stop?
Where is the restaurant?
Where is the school?
Go straight on.
Keep going straight on.
Turn left.
Turn right.
Then go straight again.
The bank is very near.
The pharmacy is not far away.
The restaurant is opposite the church.
The bus stop is next to the bank.
The school is behind the garden.
The bank is on the left.
The café is on the right.
The church is in front of you.
The museum is near the sea.
The shop is in the square.
Go until the corner.
After the corner turn right.
After the bank you will see the bus stop.
In front of the school there is a small street.
The hotel is near the airport.
The station is far away.
My friend lives near the church.
I will go to the bank today.
We are going to the restaurant on foot.
He is looking for the pharmacy.
She wants to go to the bank.
I can go there by car.
I can also go there by bus.
This road leads to the square.
The other road leads to the sea.
Look at the signs on the road.
Ask someone in the street.
The place is easy to find.
The place is not easy to find.
From the square go straight to the bank.

items.maltese: Mill-bank iddur fuq ix-xellug lejn il-knisja.
items.english: From the bank turn left toward the church.

items.maltese: Mill-knisja mur dritt lejn il-waqfa tal-linja.
items.english: From the church go straight toward the bus stop.

items.maltese: Il-librerija hija bejn il-bank u l-iskola.
items.english: The library is between the bank and the school.
The café is behind the library.
The museum is in front of the square.
The bus stop is next to the shop.
The pharmacy opens early in the morning.
The restaurant closes late in the evening.
Please, can you help me?
Of course, I will help you.
Thank you very much for the help.
You are welcome.
